purpose: Structured traceability map from the LSD v1.2 design spec into implementation and testing work.

criteria.title: User-facing blindness
criteria.requirement: Public debate surfaces expose no identity signals, likes, follower counts, contribution totals, leaderboards, or top-contributor affordances.
criteria.current_coverage: Partially covered by the current browser suite and visual design review.
criteria.next_test: Add explicit negative assertions for forbidden identity/social strings on public pages.

deferral.rationale: Out of scope for this implementation run: Phase 3 user-facing blindness hardening remains deferred to v1.3.

criteria.title: Visible moderation metadata
criteria.requirement: Snapshots publish moderation template version, allowed/blocked counts, block-reason histogram, borderline rate, and suppression rules.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Immutable snapshot dossier
criteria.requirement: Each snapshot publishes id, timestamp, trigger, moderation version, frame mode, deterministic recipes, replay manifest, and tamper-evident hashes.
criteria.current_coverage: Id, timestamp, trigger, and moderation version are present; frame metadata, replay manifest, and hashes are missing.
criteria.next_test: Add API assertions first, then expose the missing fields in snapshot/detail UI.

deferral.rationale: Out of scope for this implementation run: Phases 0.5 and 1 snapshot immutability/replay expansion are tracked separately.

criteria.title: Frame transparency
criteria.requirement: The system exposes single-frame or multi-frame mode, frame set version, review cadence, justification dossier, and petition track outputs.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Topic diagnostics
criteria.requirement: Topics are neutral, bounded, and publish relevance plus fragmentation, merge sensitivity, mass concentration, and dominance indicators.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: AU completeness proxy
criteria.requirement: Each argument unit gets a structural completeness proxy used for selection diagnostics.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Integrity and selection transparency
criteria.requirement: The system publishes aggregate integrity indicators, selection recipes, centrality cap behavior, rarity slice diagnostics, and budget adequacy indicators.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Decision dossier outputs
criteria.requirement: The verdict surface publishes D distribution, verdict/confidence, topic contributions, decisive premises/arguments, remove-topic counterfactuals, evidence-gap summaries, and frame sensitivity when applicable.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Replicates and audits
criteria.requirement: The system publishes replicate composition and the minimal high-leverage audit set, including label swap, extraction overlap, judge dispersion, frame sensitivity, integrity indicators, rarity impact, merge sensitivity, budget adequacy, and centrality cap effect.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.

criteria.title: Governance and incident hooks
criteria.requirement: The system publishes changelogs, fairness audits, appeal pathways, judge-pool governance summaries, and additive incident snapshots.
criteria.current_coverage: Implemented in LSD v1.2 gap closure run with API, UI, and deterministic contract/formula tests.
criteria.next_test: Keep enforced through test_lsd_v1_2_contracts.py and UI acceptance expansion.
